reasoning: Lactate clearance is a key limiter for you, and addressing it is essential to improve your performance on the Alpine Loop. Your last ride had a lower intensity, so we'll reintroduce structured efforts progressively. This workout focuses on replicating the intensity and demand of the 8.5-mile climb to Cascade Springs.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5 x 8-minute intervals: 3 minutes at 242-256W, 5 minutes at 201-218W. Focus on smooth transitions, simulating the climbing demands of the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Cooldown
suggested_sets.description: Easy spin to bring heart rate down gradually

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
